requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a warm neutral beige studio cyclorama. Use only an adult’s right hand is visible as the only moving person or hand. A minimalist matte-black clothing rack is. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. From the same warm beige studio scene, the camera remains locked off on a medium close view of the oatmeal beige long trench coat hanging on a light-wood hanger centered on a minimalist matte-black clothing rack. Soft diffused light from front-left gently highlights the silk–cotton faille. An adult hand wearing a simple black long-sleeve enters smoothly from the right. The hand lifts the lower front hem once and lets it fall softly to show a fluid, premium drape. Then the hand takes the hanger hook and slowly rotates the coat about thirty degrees to the left and back to front, allowing the light to glide across the fabric so a subtle sheen and crisp tailoring on the lapels, buttons, and epaulettes become visible. Next, the hand. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: From the same warm beige studio scene, the camera remains locked off on a medium close view of the oatmeal beige long trench coat hanging on a light-wood hanger centered on a minimalist matte-black clothing rack. Soft diffused light from front-left gently highlights the silk–cotton faille. An adult hand wearing a simple black long-sleeve enters smoothly from the right. The hand lifts the lower front hem once and lets it fall softly to show a fluid, premium drape. Then the hand takes the hanger hook and slowly rotates the coat about thirty degrees to the left and back to front, allowing the light to glide across the fabric so a subtle sheen and crisp tailoring on the lapels, buttons, and epaulettes become visible. Next, the hand gathers the belt at the waist and gently cinches it to suggest a clean, refined silhouette without tying a knot. The hand then centers the coat facing forward, holds it steady briefly, and exits the frame. The coat remains still, front-facing against the warm beige backdrop for a final polished hold. Keep movements slow and controlled, with no additional props, text, or logos appearing.
requests.audio_direction: Soft, minimal fashion editorial music; subtle fabric rustle when the hem is lifted; no voiceover.
